'''âd-ch-d''' ('''kadachad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luxate|luxate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luxate|luxate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-ch-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadachad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidachad|thidachad]] || [[word:jidachad|jidachad]] || [[word:shidachad|shidachad]] || [[word:kidachad|kidachad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudachad|thuthudachad]] || [[word:jujudachad|jujudachad]] || [[word:shushudachad|shushudachad]] || [[word:kukudachad|kukudachad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudachad|thudachad]] || [[word:judachad|judachad]] || [[word:shudachad|shudachad]] || [[word:kudachad|kudachad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudachad|thudachad]] || [[word:judachad|judachad]] || [[word:shudachad|shudachad]] || [[word:kudachad|kudachad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedachad|thedachad]] || [[word:jedachad|jedachad]] || [[word:shedachad|shedachad]] || [[word:kedachad|kedachad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodachad|thothodachad]] || [[word:jojodachad|jojodachad]] || [[word:shoshodachad|shoshodachad]] || [[word:kokodachad|kokodachad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodachad|thodachad]] || [[word:jodachad|jodachad]] || [[word:shodachad|shodachad]] || [[word:kodachad|kodachad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodachad|thodachad]] || [[word:jodachad|jodachad]] || [[word:shodachad|shodachad]] || [[word:kodachad|kodachad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdachad|thĂŠdachad]] || [[word:jĂŠdachad|jĂŠdachad]] || [[word:shĂŠdachad|shĂŠdachad]] || [[word:kĂŠdachad|kĂŠdachad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadachad|thathadachad]] || [[word:jajadachad|jajadachad]] || [[word:shashadachad|shashadachad]] || [[word:kakadachad|kakadachad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadachad|thadachad]] || [[word:jadachad|jadachad]] || [[word:shadachad|shadachad]] || [[word:kadachad|kadachad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadachad|thadachad]] || [[word:jadachad|jadachad]] || [[word:shadachad|shadachad]] || [[word:kadachad|kadachad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadachad|shadachad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadachad|goshadachad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadachad|gokishadachad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadachadnĂŒ|shadachadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadachadnknĂŒ|goshadachadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadachadnĂŒ|gokishadachadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadachadshĂ«|shadachadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadachadnkshĂ«|goshadachadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadachadshĂ«|gokishadachadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadachadro|shadachadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadachadnkro|goshadachadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadachadro|gokishadachadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadachadmu|shadachadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadachadnkmu|goshadachadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadachadmu|gokishadachadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadachadsher|shadachadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadachadnksher|goshadachadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadachadsher|gokishadachadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadachadng|shadachadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadachadnkng|goshadachadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadachadng|gokishadachadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadachadya|shadachadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadachadnkya|goshadachadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadachadya|gokishadachadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadachadyam|shadachadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadachadnkyam|goshadachadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadachadyam|gokishadachadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadachadnĂŒshĂ«|shadachadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadachadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadachadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadachadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadachadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadachadnĂŒro|shadachadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadachadnknĂŒro|goshadachadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadachadnĂŒro|gokishadachadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadachadnĂŒmu|shadachadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadachadnknĂŒmu|goshadachadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadachadnĂŒmu|gokishadachadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadachadshĂ«nĂŒ|shadachadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadachadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadachadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadachadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadachadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadachadshĂ«ro|shadachadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadachadnkshĂ«ro|goshadachadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadachadshĂ«ro|gokishadachadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadachadshĂ«mu|shadachadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadachadnkshĂ«mu|goshadachadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadachadshĂ«mu|gokishadachadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadachadronĂŒ|shadachadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadachadnkronĂŒ|goshadachadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadachadronĂŒ|gokishadachadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadachadroshĂ«|shadachadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadachadnkroshĂ«|goshadachadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadachadroshĂ«|gokishadachadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadachadromu|shadachadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadachadnkromu|goshadachadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadachadromu|gokishadachadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadachadmunĂŒ|shadachadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadachadnkmunĂŒ|goshadachadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadachadmunĂŒ|gokishadachadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadachadmushĂ«|shadachadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadachadnkmushĂ«|goshadachadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadachadmushĂ«|gokishadachadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadachadmuro|shadachadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadachadnkmuro|goshadachadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadachadmuro|gokishadachadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
